case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. LEO DOMOPOY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-15-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-15-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,497.29 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT DOMOPOY, LEO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOMOPOY, LEO $2,497.29 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,557.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
